<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test-test]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 14%}>> pkgA:m:typA: (read)
<{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resA]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 1 created<{%reset%}>

<{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Duration:<{%reset%}> 1s
